reason: This is a general religious reflection about fearing God, expressing mainstream Islamic sentiment about finding peace through faith. It does not contain any extremist ideology or ISIS-specific content.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: كل الاشياء الي بتخوفنا بتجيب لنا الهم والغم ، الا الخوف من الله عزوجل وحده الي يحسسك بالراحه والطمأنينه .
